introSection: Warrior Challenge (Vietnamese: Thử Thách Chiến Binh) is a steel roller coaster at VinWonders Vũ Yên in Thủy Nguyên, Hải Phòng, Vietnam. It was built by Dutch firm Vekoma.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Warrior Challenge features an inclined turntable, which allows the train to change direction.

fullText:
Warrior Challenge (Vietnamese: Thử Thách Chiến Binh) is a steel roller coaster at VinWonders Vũ Yên in Thủy Nguyên, Hải Phòng, Vietnam. It was built by Dutch firm Vekoma.

Warrior Challenge features an inclined turntable, which allows the train to change direction.
